templates.name: doc-kami-parchment
templates.description: Warm-parchment editorial document — calm reading surface for essays, memos, letters, raw notes. Default fallback for prose content.
templates.picks_when: Long-form prose, essay, memo, letter, report, or unclassified text — the safest generic default.

templates.name: data-report
templates.description: Visual data report — converts CSV / JSON / SQL result sets into a single-page report with charts and headline KPIs.
templates.picks_when: Input is tabular: CSV, TSV, markdown table, JSON array of records, SQL result set, or numeric metric stream.

templates.name: meeting-notes
templates.description: Meeting decision log — agenda, decisions, action items, attendees.
templates.picks_when: Transcript, agenda, decisions, action items, attendee list — meeting-shaped content.

templates.name: resume-modern
templates.description: Minimal A4 résumé — single column, clear hierarchy, print-safe.
templates.picks_when: Résumé, CV, portfolio bio, work history, education + experience structure.

templates.name: deck-simple
templates.description: Horizontal-swipe slide deck — cover + content slides + closing, keyboard nav.
templates.picks_when: Slide outline, pitch outline, study session, or the user explicitly says 'make a deck'.

templates.name: eng-runbook
templates.description: Incident / engineering runbook — procedure steps, rollback, on-call hand-off.
templates.picks_when: SQL queries without results, API call notes, incident notes, deploy procedure, on-call runbook, ops checklist.

templates.name: saas-landing
templates.description: SaaS landing page — hero, features, social proof, pricing, FAQ, footer.
templates.picks_when: Product feature list, launch copy, pricing tiers, waitlist sign-up, marketing one-pager.

templates.name: social-x-post-card
templates.description: X / Twitter quote card — 1600×900 single quote with byline.
templates.picks_when: Single quote, announcement, sharp claim, very short post (< 280 chars effective body).
